channel.title: AI Freedom Institute — Blog
channel.description: Practical AI guides, tutorials and case studies for Indian students, professionals and business owners. Written in simple Hinglish by Ajit (AI Finance Guy).
channel.copyright: © 2026 AI Freedom Institute. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: AI Se Paise Kaise Kamayein? — 5 Real Tarike (2026 Mein Real Income)
item.author: info@aifreedom.in (Ajit)
item.description: 5 proven AI income methods — freelancing, agency, faceless YouTube, copywriting, micro-SaaS. Real numbers, honest reality check, and a decision tree.

item.title: ChatGPT Kaise Use Karein? — Complete Step-by-Step Guide (2026)
item.author: info@aifreedom.in (Ajit)
item.description: Account setup, 6-part prompt formula, 10 ready-to-copy prompts, common mistakes, and free vs Plus comparison — all in simple Hinglish.

item.title: AI Kya Hai? — Beginners Ke Liye Complete Hindi Guide (2026)
item.author: info@aifreedom.in (Ajit)
item.description: AI ka matlab, kaam, types, aur 8 daily Indian examples. Why every Indian student and professional should learn AI in 2026 — in simple Hinglish.

item.title: How to Use ChatGPT for Studies in India — Complete 2026 Guide
item.author: info@aifreedom.in (Ajit)
item.description: Practical step-by-step guide to using ChatGPT for studies in India — notes, revision, essays, project prep, exam strategy. Honest, not cheating. Written in simple Hinglish.
